testbench-cli-reporter.label: TestBench CLI Reporter
testbench-cli-reporter.description: Command-line tool for reporting test results from CI/CD pipelines directly to TestBench.

testbench-defect-service.label: TestBench Defect Service
testbench-defect-service.description: Service for synchronizing defects between external sources and TestBench.

testbench-requirement-service.label: TestBench Requirement Service
testbench-requirement-service.description: Service for synchronizing requirements between external sources and TestBench.

testbench-vscode-extension.label: TestBench VSCode Extension
testbench-vscode-extension.description: The TestBench Extension enables seamless synchronization between TestBench and Robot Framework files in VS Code.

testbench2robotframework.label: TestBench2RobotFramework
testbench2robotframework.description: Command-line tool for generating Robot Framework test specification from TestBench and read Robot Framework test results to TestBench.

robotframework-libdoc2testbench.label: Libdoc2TestBench
robotframework-libdoc2testbench.description: Libdoc2TestBench is a Robot Framework Libdoc extension that generates import formats compatible with TestBench.
